workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and language MUST be tailored to {user_skill_level}
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps
This workflow implements a SINGLE task only - do not implement multiple tasks

step.critical: Validate task_number parameter is provided and valid

check.output:
❌ Error: --task=N parameter is required (N must be >= 1)
Usage: /bmad-bmm-dev-story-task --task=N Where N is the task number to implement (1-indexed)

step.action: Load session file: {{session_file}}
Parse session.yaml to extract: - story_key - story_path - story_title - current_task - total_tasks - status

step.goal: Validate task number and load plan
step.action: Load plan file: {{plan_file}}
Parse plan.md to extract the task list
Count total tasks in plan.md

check.output: Proceeding with task {{task_number}} implementation...

step.action: Extract details for task {{task_number}} from plan.md: - Task description - Files to create/modify - Dependencies - Estimated complexity

step.goal: Load context handoff at session start
step.critical: Load context-handoff.md at session start to get exports from previous tasks
step.action: Load context handoff file: {{context_handoff_file}}

check.action: Extract context from context-handoff.md: - Architecture decisions made - Patterns to follow - Exports from previous tasks (Task {{task_number - 1}} exports) - Constraints and risks - Design system references
check.output: ✅ **Context handoff loaded at session start** - Using {{count}} previous exports

step.action: Load story file: {{story_path}}

check.output:
❌ Error: Original story file not found
Story expected at: {{story_path}}

step.action: Extract story context: - Acceptance Criteria - Dev Notes - Architecture requirements - File List

check.if: task has dependencies that are not yet completed
check.output:
⚠️ Warning: Task {{task_number}} has dependencies that may not be complete
**Dependencies:** {{list of dependencies from plan.md}}
**Recommended:** Ensure dependent tasks are implemented before this task.
**Would you like to:** 1. Proceed anyway (at your own risk) 2. Cancel and implement dependencies first
Proceeding with task {{task_number}} implementation...

Cancelling. Please implement dependent tasks first.
To view task dependencies, check: {{plan_file}}

step.critical: This is the CORE implementation step - implement ONLY task {{task_number}}
Do NOT implement any other tasks from the plan
Detect plan issues during implementation and trigger replan if needed
step.action: Read task {{task_number}} details from plan.md
Review files to create/modify list
Check for existing files that need modification

Implement the task following this approach: 1. Create new files as specified 2. Modify existing files as needed 3. Follow patterns from context-handoff.md 4. Adhere to design tokens and architecture constraints 5. Ensure all acceptance criteria related to this task are met
step.critical: Monitor for plan issues during implementation. If any of these occur, trigger replan:

check.if: implementation encounters ANY of these plan issues: - Task is too large to complete in a single session (approaches token limit) - Missing dependencies discovered during implementation - Architectural constraints not accounted for in plan - Technical blockers that require task breakdown - Task complexity was underestimated - Requirements discovered that aren't covered by current plan

check.action: Write replan_reason and related fields to {{session_file}}: - replan_reason: {{Issue Type: {{specific issue description}}} - replan_proposal: "triggered" - Note: plan_version and replan_history remain unchanged (updated by replan workflow)
check.output:
❌ **HALTING - Replan Triggered**
replan_reason written to {{session_file}}. Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-replan` to create an adjusted plan.
This allows the plan to be fixed before continuing implementation.
**Session State:** - current_task: {{task_number}} (unchanged - will proceed after replan) - replan_reason: Set (triggers replan detection) - replan_proposal: "triggered"
⚠️ Attempting workarounds (not recommended for plan issues)
Note: Workarounds may not resolve fundamental plan issues.

step.action: Run: npm run lint (in zoniq/ directory)

check.output:
⚠️ Lint errors detected:
{{lint error output}}
**Lint errors must be fixed before proceeding.**
**Would you like to:** 1. Fix lint errors automatically 2. Fix lint errors manually 3. Cancel and review
⚠️ Some lint errors remain. Please fix manually or cancel.

check.ask: Press Enter when lint errors are fixed:

check.output: ❌ Lint still fails. Please fix all lint errors.

step.critical: Validate implementation before writing progress report
step.action: Collect implementation data: - List all files created during this task - List all files modified during this task - List all files deleted during this task - Extract exports (components, hooks, utilities) created - Note any issues or blockers encountered

Validate required files exist: - Check each file in "Files to create/modify" from plan.md - For planned files that don't exist, note in "Issues Encountered" - Verify file paths are correct (relative to project root)
Validate lint status from step 7: - If lint failed and was fixed, document in "Issues Encountered" - If lint passed, note in "Implementation Notes"
Create progress file: {{progress_file}}
Verify progress file was created successfully

step.goal: Update context handoff with auto-discovered exports
step.critical: Automatically discover and merge exports into context-handoff.md
step.action: Read current {{context_handoff_file}}
Read {{progress_file}} to get manually documented exports

Auto-discover exports from files created in this task: - For each file in files_created list: - Scan file for export statements (export default, export const, export function) - Extract React components (files with JSX return, functions starting with uppercase) - Extract custom hooks (functions starting with 'use') - Extract utility functions (export const/function) - Extract TypeScript interfaces/types (export interface/type) - Build structured exports list with: - Export name - File path - Type (component/hook/utility/type) - Brief description (from JSDoc or inference)
Compare auto-discovered exports with manually documented exports: - If discrepancy found, prefer auto-discovered but flag in output - Note any exports that were documented but not found in code
Update "### Folder Structure" section if new folders created
Update "📦 Expected Exports" section: - Mark Task {{task_number}} exports as completed: [x] - Keep future tasks unchecked: [ ]

step.goal: Update session state with enhanced tracking
step.critical: Update session.yaml with comprehensive task completion tracking
step.action: Read current {{session_file}}

Extract task completion data from {{progress_file}}: - files_created: list of files created during task - files_modified: list of files modified during task - exports: list of exports/components/utilities created - issues: any issues encountered

Validate session state consistency: - Verify {{progress_file}} exists - Verify completed_tasks array length matches task_status entries with status="completed" - Verify current_task points to incomplete task or total_tasks
step.output:
✅ **Session state updated with enhanced tracking**
**Updated fields:** - completed_tasks: {{updated array}} - task_status.{{task_number}}: marked completed - current_task: {{next_task}} - Files tracked: {{files_created_count}} created, {{files_modified_count}} modified - Exports tracked: {{exports_count}} new exports

check.output:
🎉 **ALL TASKS COMPLETE!**
Story {{story_key}} implementation is done.
**Next Steps:** 1. Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-verify` to run tests, lint, and build 2. After verification passes, run `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-complete` to finalize
**View Status:** Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status` to see session details

✅ **Task {{task_number}} Complete!**
**Story:** {{story_key}} **Progress:** {{task_number}} / {{total_tasks}} tasks complete
**Generated Files:** - {{progress_file}} - Task progress report - Updated context-handoff.md - Exports for next task
**Next Steps:** 1. Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-task --task={{task_number + 1}}` to implement next task 2. Or run `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status` to see overall progress
**View Status:** Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status` at any time to check progress

step.action: Ask user if they want to continue to the next task immediately

check.output: Starting task {{task_number + 1}}...
